title: Phan Thiet, Binh Thuan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Phan Thiet, Binh Thuan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Phan Thiet is a city in Binh Thuan with a population of 350,000. Home to the famous Mui Ne sand dunes and a growing beach resort scene, this coastal city offers some of the most affordable beachfront living in Southeast Asia.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
